text:
Created attachment 254488
Update from 1.21.1 to 1.21.2

Hello,

This patch updates games/minecraft-server to 1.21.2

Full changelog available on official website https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-java-edition-1-21-2

It works fine on 14.1-RELEASE amd64.
